binding.note: The uniform-binding contract the data (.dope) can't carry — which render.params are NOT shader uniforms, the seed-keyed scatter field, the per-frame/host extras, and the texture samplers. One source of truth for the Swift struct + MSL struct + web name-list (was scripts/gen-uniforms.mjs's EFFECTS.comic block).

platforms.note: Per-platform build config. `dopamine build` emits one standalone, installable package per platform into dist/<platform>/. The hand-written per-platform sources live under this folder (swift/, android/, web/); the toolchain copies them in, generates the binding glue, and embeds a REAL copy of the .dope.
